settings.title: Made to order
settings.text: Every piece is engraved for one person — yours.

settings.title: Photo proof first
settings.text: You approve the real engraving before it ships.

settings.title: 30-day guarantee
settings.text: Not right? We remake it or refund you.

settings.question: What if I don't know the exact coordinates?
settings.answer: You don't need to. Search the place by name or drop a pin on the map and we read the precise latitude and longitude for you.

settings.question: Can I engrave more than one place?
settings.answer: Yes. The vertical bar necklace has up to four faces — put coordinates on one, a name on another, a date on a third.

settings.question: How long until it arrives?
settings.answer: Each piece is engraved to order. You'll see estimated delivery dates right on the product page, and we send a photo proof before shipping.

settings.question: What if the engraving looks wrong?
settings.answer: That's exactly why we send a proof photo first. Nothing ships until you approve it, and you're covered by our 30-day happiness guarantee.

settings.eyebrow: Place to keepsake in five steps
settings.heading: How it works
settings.subheading: From the spot that matters to a piece you'll wear forever — here's exactly what happens, start to finish.
settings.recap_eyebrow: Why people trust us with it
